K2 & Mwala Crushing Elephant Charge 2015

3 October 2015 · 📍 Mukwisi River

17 Entries
10 Completed
59% Finish rate
$54,832 Raised
10 Checkpoints
3× Gauntlet mult.
Results Checkpoints Awards Grants 🗺 Map

Net distance = competition distance minus penalties. Shorter net distance = better result. Gauntlet checkpoints carry a ×3 distance penalty.

Spirit of the Charge

Swamp Donkeys — Traveled from Botswana to take part in their first charge and completed the course.
